name: Vw Bus LLC
registry_source: Montana Secretary of State business search not directly accessible via WebFetch (requires interactive session at biz.sosmt.gov)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under VW, VW BUS, or VW BUS LLC. Comprehensive VW-prefix list returned (60+ entries) contained no Montana bus/passenger carrier. Likely intrastate-only operator below FMCSA registration thresholds, or possibly a Montana LLC formed primarily for vehicle registration / personal-use bus titling (Montana is a common state for VW Bus title parking via LLCs - this name pattern is suggestive of that use case rather than an active school bus contractor).
